summary: Comprehensive testing of Unified Appointments feature and UI fixes. Backend APIs all working correctly. Frontend features verified: Provider dashboard with stats, Profile edit with Save button at correct position, Clients list with appointment badge, Provider Appointments showing unified data. Marketplace provider profile About Me section has no redundancy.

minor.issue: Response structure returns user data at root level instead of nested in 'user' key - minor test assertion issue, functionality works

integration_issues.issue: URL /appointments routes to provider view (shows 'No Appointments - Link a client account') instead of Mom's appointments view. Bottom nav shows 'Clients' instead of 'My Team' on this page. This appears to be a routing/layout issue in Expo router.

action_items: Fix Mom's /appointments route - currently showing provider layout instead of mom layout. The backend API returns 3 appointments correctly for Mom but frontend displays wrong view.
critical_code_review_comments: Mom appointments routing: The /appointments URL appears to resolve to (doula)/appointments.tsx instead of (mom)/appointments.tsx when logged in as Mom. Verify Expo router is using correct layout based on user role.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend unified appointments API is fully functional. All 3 test users (Doula, Midwife, Mom) can login and access /api/appointments correctly. Provider features (Dashboard stats, Profile Save button, Clients with appointment badge, Appointments list) all working. Mom's /appointments frontend route has wrong layout - shows provider view instead of mom view despite correct API response.

verified_features.provider_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats: Active Clients (1), Upcoming Appts (1), Pending Contracts, Pending Invoices
verified_features.provider_profile_save_button: PASS - Save Changes button appears below all editable fields (Practice Info, Video Intro, More About Me) and above Subscription section
verified_features.provider_clients_list: PASS - Shows Active Clients with appointment badge ('Appt' with calendar icon)
verified_features.provider_appointments: PASS - Shows appointments from unified endpoint with client name, date, time, status
verified_features.marketplace_about_me: PASS - Provider Profile modal shows single 'About Me' section with no redundancy
verified_features.unified_appointments_api: PASS - Returns appointments for both provider and mom roles correctly
